Please generate a current project kanban status snapshot in JSON format, saved to the day09/ directory. Categorize tasks by status (backlog/in_progress/done/blocked), and record the count and task list for each status. Include a snapshot_at (current time) field.

content.text:
[Wed 2026-03-18 13:19 EDT] [Previous Feedback] Correct!

Please generate a current project kanban status snapshot in JSON format, saved to the day09/ directory. Categorize tasks by status (backlog/in_progress/done/blocked), and record the count and task list for each status. Include a snapshot_at (current time) field.

Kanban snapshot created and saved to `day09/20260326_kanban_snapshot.json`.

**Sprint 8 Kanban Summary:**

| Column | Count | Tasks |
|--------|-------|-------|
| Done | 3 | T-401, T-404, T-410 |
| In Progress | 4 | T-402 (75%), T-406 (85%), T-407 (40%), T-408 (50%) |
| Blocked | 1 | T-403 (60% — waiting for T-402) |
| Backlog | 2 | T-405, T-409 |

**Key Metrics:**
- Completion Rate: 30% (3/10 tasks done)
- Blockers: 1 (T-403 dependent on T-402)
- At Risk: T-405 (not started, due Friday)
